content: These criteria scored 95%+ on first attempt and don't discriminate quality — consider making them harder or removing: saas_revenue_recognition_manipulation_techniques, benfords_law_methodology_violations, advanced_analytics_technique_precision, fraud_risk_factor_assessment, comparative_period_variance_decomposition
task: Write a forensic accounting memo analyzing suspected revenue manipulation at a mid-market SaaS company. Include journal entry analysis, Benfords Law testing, timeline reconstruction, and quantified financial impact.
